(3) read as follows: “For purposes of paragraph (1), a personal service corporation (within the meaning of section 469(j)(2)) shall be treated as a taxpayer other than a corporation.”Pub. L. 115–972014—Subsec. (a)(2)(A). , substituted “section 461(j)” for “section 464(c)”.Pub. L. 113–295, § 221(a)(58)(E)Subsec. (b). , inserted “and” at end of par. (1), redesignated par. (a)(3). , substituted “469(j)(2)” for “469(g)(1)(C)”.Pub. L. 100–647, § 1007(d)(2)Subsec. (a)(4). , added par. (4).Pub. L. 100–647, § 1007(d)(3)Subsec. (b). , added pars. (1) to (3) and struck out former pars. (1) to (3) which read as follows:Pub. L. 100–647, § 1007(d)(4)“(1) the adjustments of section 56 shall apply,“(2) any deduction to the extent such deduction is an item of tax preference under section 57(a) shall not be taken into account, and“(3) the provisions of section 469(m) (relating to phase-in of disallowance) shall not apply.”1987—Subsec. (b)(3). substituted “section 469(m)” for “section 469()”.Pub. L. 100–203l

children.heading: Disallowance of farm loss
children.label: A Disallowance of farm loss
children.text: No loss of the taxpayer for such taxable year from any tax shelter farm activity shall be allowed.

children.heading: Deduction in succeeding taxable year
children.label: B Deduction in succeeding taxable year
children.text: Any loss from a tax shelter farm activity disallowed under subparagraph (A) shall be treated as a deduction allocable to such activity in the 1st succeeding taxable year.

children.label: A
children.text: any farming syndicate as defined in section 461(k), and

children.label: B
children.text: any other activity consisting of farming which is a passive activity (within the meaning of section 469(c)).

children.heading: Determination of loss
children.label: 3 Determination of loss
children.text: In determining the amount of the loss from any tax shelter farm activity, the adjustments of sections 56 and 57 shall apply.

children.heading: Disallowance of passive activity loss
children.label: b Disallowance of passive activity loss

children.text: the adjustments of sections 56 and 57 shall apply, and
in lieu of applying section 469(j)(7), the passive activity loss of a taxpayer shall be computed without regard to qualified housing interest (as defined in section 56(e)).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The amount of losses to which subsection (a) or (b) applies shall be reduced by the amount (if any) by which the taxpayer is insolvent as of the close of the taxable year.

children.heading: Insolvent
children.label: B Insolvent
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “insolvent” means the excess of liabilities over the fair market value of assets.

children.heading: Loss allowed for year of disposition of farm shelter activity
children.label: 2 Loss allowed for year of disposition of farm shelter activity
children.text: If the taxpayer disposes of his entire interest in any tax shelter farm activity during any taxable year, the amount of the loss attributable to such activity (determined after carryovers under subsection (a)(1)(B)) shall (to the extent otherwise allowable) be allowed for such taxable year in computing alternative minimum taxable income and not treated as a loss from a tax shelter farm activity.
